description: ZeroTier provides software-defined networking that lets you create and manage virtual networks connecting devices and services. Its hosted Central control plane manages organizations and networks, while the local ZeroTier One agent runs on individual machines.
summary: ZeroTier exposes three developer integration surfaces: the New Central V2 HTTP API, the Legacy Central HTTP API, the local ZeroTier One Service HTTP API, plus the local `zerotier-cli` CLI; all require tokens or local privileged access.
